horoscope: Today's harmony between Mars, your planetary ruler, and Jupiter can point to successful connections, dear Aries, as well as affirmative action that leads to improvements this week. You're beginning to feel much more confident and enthusiastic. Considerable energy is available to you for personal projects, home- or family-related pursuits, and activities behind the scenes. You might choose to help someone out, do a good deed, accomplish something significant with family or loved ones, or work on a home project. Feelings about something from your past can be a driving force to make changes. It can be a time to see the way around an obstacle that you once thought was insurmountable. Forgiving, lenient, happy energy is with you concerning others, and an event occurring now brings up past feelings.

You're in a great position to connect with others in empowering ways today, dear Taurus. There can be connections made that are truly useful and beneficial to you. Mars, currently transiting in your networking sector, harmonizes with Jupiter in your communications zone, linking these matters in creative, enterprising, and successful ways. These influences make it a great time for making contact. Opportunities for new projects or connections can emerge, and you’re making them happen by actively pursuing leads. You can feel uniquely inspired. Indeed, your ability to coordinate serves you well, and you’re likely to feel more optimistic than you have in a while. Mercury’s forward turn in your social sector yesterday promised more clarity and understanding with friends. Today, this Mars-Jupiter aspect fills you with enthusiasm. You can feel especially inspired and interested in putting an idea or plan into motion.

Mars at the top of your chart indicates extra energy and ambition to reach your goals and advance these days, dear Gemini. Mars harmonizes with Jupiter in your resources sector today, which can inspire your enterprising side this week. Instead, you may be exceptionally resourceful in your work, drawing upon your talents to make things happen. This energy encourages a desire to feel connected to and energized by the world around you. You may be drawing power and motivation from exploring new methods or subjects. There can be a nice boost from a person who can help you achieve your goals, but for the most part, you are the one who is actively making things happen right now. It’s a strong time for career and practical matters in general, as you are especially willing to take charge and go after what you want. Projects come together almost magically. Opportunities emerge related to work- and career-related efforts, your reputation, or status. It can be a time for a boost in popularity or for gaining an edge or advantage in business or your career. With Mercury now direct, you're feeling more enthusiastic.

Mars harmonizes with Jupiter in your sign today, dear Cancer, and you're looking to break out of the mold or routine through what you learn, what you do, or where you go. You're courageous and motivated to try new things, and your increased confidence can lead to nice opportunities now. Energy is high, and you want to take part in activities that push you outside your usual routine. Plans related to travel, education, or publishing might come together nicely now. You have an expanded vision of what you want to experience or achieve in the future, making it a good time to set goals, although practical details will need your attention later. You have the energy to put into your goals and ideas. Plus, expanding your knowledge or opening yourself up to new experiences can help you feel that you're developing as a person. You’re attracting others mainly through your ideas and beliefs or your unique viewpoint and style, and appreciation feels good and reinforcing.

Harmony between Mars and Jupiter today can fill you with inner courage now, dear Leo. You might take an intimate relationship to a new level or discover something powerful about yourself. It's an excellent time for support, whether emotional, mental, or financial. You are exceptionally resourceful, and your desire to improve, grow, and overcome obstacles is great. This can be a time to reap the rewards of past actions or to take steps to put a problem behind you. If you've had a lifestyle change in mind, plans to get that started can emerge. It can also be an excellent time for resolving conflicts with others. Personal goals that are set to empower you can be in focus. With the belief that you deserve more, success seems imminent. The desire to win can move you to make improvements.

With a Mars-Jupiter trine today, dear Virgo, teamwork can be golden now! You draw others to you with your sincerity and confidence. Opportunities to advance or reach your goals seem to arise through relationships and contacts right now, making it an excellent time to mingle and connect. It’s an excellent time to lay the groundwork for promotion and networking, or to take steps to put a problem behind you. People in your life are encouraging you, or your relationship with someone is a motivator for handling a problem. Your inventive and enterprising side is active today, and it feels good! Connecting with a partner or partnering up to produce something special is favored today. You’re well-positioned to collaborate and problem-solve.

Energies for work and practical matters are particularly empowering for you now, dear Libra. Mars in your sector of work, health, and habits harmonizes with Jupiter at the top of your solar chart, and you want to make things happen! With this enterprising energy, actions can open up fantastic opportunities to improve your work, do the work you love, or advance a major goal. You may be seeking out (and finding) more meaning in the work you do or the services you provide. Energy and motivation levels soar! You can feel pumped up about pursuing health or fitness programs or energized to improve your habits and daily routines. Your powers of persuasion are also strong. You can gain an advantage with a real feel for what others want, coupled with your confidence in what you’re doing. It’s time to get an edge, and it feels great.

Mercury has just ended its retrograde, dear Scorpio, helping to unclog information. Today, Mars and Jupiter are harmonizing, and opportunities can emerge for you to express yourself in new and satisfying ways, get creative, make fun connections, learn new things, or even fall in love. You’re feeling more courageous and willing to try new things. You can have an exciting new hobby or personal interest, and you’re looking to freshen your mind with new possibilities. Taking steps to free yourself from a debilitating situation or problem can figure strongly now, and it feels great. Creative juices are flowing, and romantic energy is strong. Your personal magnetism is skyrocketing along with your increased confidence. Expressive and creative pursuits are in especially good favor. You may gain an advantage in a romantic, playful, or creative endeavor.

Personal, financial, or domestic matters can be especially rewarding and fruitful now, dear Sagittarius. Not only has Mercury ended its retrograde, but today's Mars-Jupiter trine sparks your enthusiasm. Support on mental, physical, economic, or spiritual levels can arrive, whether you are giving it or receiving it! There can be a pleasant intensity or activity in an intimate relationship, and possibly in home projects. You may be exploring new ways of relating to loved ones. You are more confident and courageous about achieving results, and this attitude significantly increases your chances of success. Responses to your actions, plans, and ideas are favorable and warm. You may have an opportunity to take action on a personal or family matter today. Not only are you approaching problems with courage and great insight, but you also have the tools to do something about them, not just talk about them.

Mercury has just ended its retrograde cycle, dear Capricorn, and communications are beginning to clear up. Today, a Mars-Jupiter trine helps further your motivation and deepen your enthusiasm. Getting active with a partner, even in small ways such as sharing time running errands, can give your relationship a nice boost. You may be pairing up with someone to put an idea into motion now. Your charm is powerful now, particularly when you use direct, respectful communication and approaches. With less concern about what to say when, you are better able to gain someone's trust. For best results, share your affections liberally and use the additional courage you have now to make a real improvement in your life and your relationships.

You’re motivated to improve your health and wellness, dear Aquarius, and you appreciate and enjoy your everyday life more thoroughly. Today’s Mars-Jupiter aspect inspires you to improve, grow, and develop, particularly with your work, talents, money, and habits. You feel that you can accomplish practically anything you set your mind to, and the motivation to make more money or enjoy your work is on the rise. An opportunity can emerge to put your talents and skills to full use. Alternatively, this is a time to take steps toward putting a problem behind you, helping clear a path for new beginnings. You have an excellent sense of timing and ability to solve problems right now. The feeling that you can overcome challenges or obstacles that might normally block your progress moves you forward.

With Mercury no longer retrograde and a Mars-Jupiter trine today, dear Pisces, you are in great shape for learning and leisure. You may be motivated to pursue your heart’s desire. Your confidence and sincerity win admirers now, and you’re likely to receive positive feedback. It can be a time to tap into your enterprising side. Fortunately, your enthusiasm is building. You have the confidence to make things happen, particularly when it comes to fun, romance, children, and creative projects. Your personal appeal runs high today, and gaining respect, admiration, or support comes more readily than usual. You’re in a boosted position to build rapport and trust. Your confidence and sincerity win admirers now, and you’ll likely receive positive feedback. This is a time to take the initiative rather than simply wait for things to happen.
